docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26753, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,805.00 FILED BY KING, DAVID K. WIGNER, MICHEAL AS TO DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, DAVID K. WIGNER, MICHEAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY $4,805.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY APPEAL DISMISSED, CASE SETTLED PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT'S WRITTEN AGREEMENT. JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED IN SCA 26753 ON 1/16/02 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAUPIN, GARY
